Home / Services / Leak Detection

Leak Detection

Pinpointing hidden leaks to prevent water damage and save you money.

Undetected leaks can wreak havoc on your Miami property, leading to structural damage, mold growth, and skyrocketing water bills. Home Pros Of Miami, Inc., employs advanced leak detection technology to accurately locate hidden leaks behind walls, under floors, and in your yard. We use thermal imaging, acoustic listening devices, and video camera inspections to minimize disruption and pinpoint the source of the problem quickly and efficiently.

Once the leak is located, we'll provide a comprehensive repair plan and transparent pricing. We handle everything from minor pipe repairs to complete re-piping, ensuring the job is done right the first time. Don't let a hidden leak drain your wallet and damage your property. Call us today for a professional leak detection service.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Initial Assessment and Inspection
  2. 02 Step 2: Advanced Leak Detection Techniques (Thermal Imaging, Acoustic Listening)
  3. 03 Step 3: Precise Leak Location and Documentation
  4. 04 Step 4: Repair Plan and Cost Estimate

Benefits

  • Prevent Water Damage and Mold Growth
  • Lower Water Bills
  • Protect Your Property Value
  • Accurate and Non-Invasive Leak Detection

Frequently Asked Questions

How do I know if I have a hidden leak?

Signs of a hidden leak include unexplained increases in your water bill, damp spots on walls or ceilings, and the sound of running water when all fixtures are off. If you suspect a leak, call us immediately.

What technology do you use to detect leaks?

We use a variety of advanced technologies, including thermal imaging cameras, acoustic listening devices, and video camera inspections, to pinpoint the source of the leak without causing unnecessary damage.

How much does leak detection cost?

The cost of leak detection varies depending on the complexity of the situation. We provide free estimates, so call us today to schedule an inspection.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with leak detection? Contact us today.
